operational_knowledge_units.title: Items are parcels tracked on the sorter
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide defines items as parcels on the sorter and describes them as records that are updated from UPS messages and removed when they divert to their final destination.
observed_evidence: Items are parcels on the sorter.
We listen to Scan_Data2, Sort, and SortConf from UPS.
We update the items as we receive messages and remove them when they divert to their final destination.

relationships.target: Removed when parcel diverts to final destination

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Item Models defines items as parcels on the sorter. Item records are updated from UPS Scan_Data2, Sort, and SortConf messages and removed when they divert to their final destination.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Item records are maintained from UPS message traffic
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The system listens to UPS messages and updates item records as messages arrive. Item records are removed after diversion to the final destination.
observed_evidence: We listen to Scan_Data2, Sort, and SortConf from UPS.
We update the items as we receive messages and remove them when they divert to their final destination.

relationships.target: Final destination divert removes item record

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Sorter Sweeper item records are maintained by listening to UPS Scan_Data2, Sort, and SortConf messages. Records are updated as messages are received and removed when the item diverts to its final destination.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Scan_Data2 provides core package attributes for item records
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide identifies the fields provided by Scan_Data2 for item data: PackageUID, Tracking number, Length, Width, Height, Weight, and Package Classification.
observed_evidence: Scan_Data2 provides us with PackageUID, Tracking number, Length, Width, Height, Weight, and Package Classification.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Scan_Data2 supplies item model package attributes including PackageUID, tracking number, dimensions, weight, and package classification.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Item Cube Adjustment Model stores cube percentage by package classification
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The Item Cube Adjustment Model stores the percentage of package cube to use based on package classification.
observed_evidence: Item Cube Adjustment Model stores the % of the cube we should take based on packages classification.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Item Cube Adjustment Model stores the percent of package cube used, based on package classification.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Item Default Dim Model stores fallback dimensions for missing values
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The Item Default Dim Model stores default dimensions to be used when a package dimension is missing.
observed_evidence: Item Default Dim Model stores the default dimensions when one is missing.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Item Default Dim Model contains default dimensions used when one package dimension is missing.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Recirc Destinations Model stores end-of-line destinations
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The Recirc Destinations Model stores destinations used for packages that go off the end.
observed_evidence: Recirc Destinations Model stores the destinations that are for packages that go off the end.

relationships.target: Packages that go off the end

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Recirc Destinations Model stores destinations for packages that go off the end of the sorter flow.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Item tracking includes recirculation count and missing-message indicators
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The item model tracks recirculation frequency, whether dimension data is missing, and whether an induction message was never received.
observed_evidence: We track how often the item recirc, If it is missing some dimension data and if we never received an Induction message.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Item records track operational diagnostic indicators including how often an item recirculates, whether dimension data is missing, and whether no induction message was received.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: No explicit reusable procedure on item models slide
preconditions: Reviewer is examining slide 100 for procedural content
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Informational slide describing item-related database models, message inputs, and tracked attributes; no ordered actions or operator instructions are shown.
warnings: Slide describes data sources, model purposes, and tracked fields but does not provide an explicit action sequence.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Discarded as procedure candidate: slide 100 contains database and system behavior context for item models, including UPS message inputs and item tracking fields, but no explicit operational steps.
